# Poetry MOC (Map of Content)

## 📌 Initialization
- [[create project]]: Create a new Poetry project (`poetry new`).
- [[pyproject.toml]]: Structure and configuration of `pyproject.toml`.

## ⚙️ Virtual Environments
- [[show environment info]]: Check current virtual environment info (`poetry env info`).
- [[activate environment]]: How to activate the virtual environment (`poetry env activate`).

## 📦 Dependency Management
- [[add new dependency]]: Add a new library to the project (`poetry add`).
- [[install all dependencies]]: Install existing libraries from the lock file (`poetry install`).

## 🚀 Packaging & Publishing (Publishing to PyPi)
- [[guide publish package to pypi]]: Step-by-step guide to publishing libraries to PyPi.
- [[add pypi account to poetry]]: Configure PyPi account using HTTP basic authentication.
- [[add token to account]]: Configure PyPi token for secure package uploading.
- [[publish to pypi]]: Build and publish package to PyPi (`poetry publish`).
